title: CV Recognition App
tagline: Intelligent CV parsing and candidate recognition powered by computer vision and NLP.
description: A computer vision and NLP pipeline that automatically extracts structured data from CV documents — regardless of format or layout. Built to reduce manual screening effort and surface the most relevant candidates based on configurable criteria.
highlights: Parses PDFs, Word docs, and scanned CVs
Configurable matching criteria per job role

items: Model training details and fine-tuning approach
restricted.label: Benchmarks, integrations, and model details are available on request
